extraction.one_line_summary: MARTIN Dan attacked 4.5km from finish on Val Morelle, gained 15 seconds immediately as favorites hesitated, held off THOMAS Geraint's late surge by 4 seconds
tactical_patterns: Sky maintained breakaway gap under 3 minutes all day, controlling without eliminating—reveals tempo threshold for threat assessment.
Martin exploited GC position discount: lower-ranked rider attacking steep finish creates hesitation among marked favorites despite dangerous capability.
Thomas closed 15-second gap to 4 seconds in final kilometer but started chase too late—Sky miscalculated threat level.

rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: first stage win since 2014 Beijing suggests breakthrough after winless season, attacks with conviction on steep finishes
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: strongest late-race acceleration of favorites, took yellow jersey, but tactical awareness delayed chase initiation
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: podium but lacked explosiveness to follow Martin's initial attack on steep gradient
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: lost 16 seconds on short steep finish despite being marked favorite, faded in closing kilometers
